entry.title: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content: I would like to know which API to call and which communication scenario to configure in the 'Communication Arrangements' so I can retrieve the results shown in the attached image. I used 'API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV,' but the results I found seem different.

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content:
SOLUTION found: the problem was in my mapping. I pushed all in 1 block. Different messages were put in A_SlsPrcgConditionRecordType.
Now, I changed the mapping and individual messages are put in batchChangeSetPart. That was the key to success.

entry.title: Re: How to reduce the number of parallel deletion processes in FI_DOCUMNT archiving object
entry.content:
you can look into below options

1. change customizing & set delete jobs to not scheduled, later run the delete jobs manually with SARA - delete (select the sessions & files manually)

there is a software which overcomes all such challenges by automation of the entire archiving process https://www.tjc-group.com/asc/

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
I believe your option is the correct one. EXCEPT/MINUS is what I would use for efficiency reasons. I would discard the JOIN due to its poorer performance in HANA compared to columnar operations.

Perhaps you could consider creating a HASH of the row using something like HASH_MD5() and comparing them instead of using all the columns. However, I’m not sure if you would gain anything from this. Try creating a PLAN and evaluate the costs for comparison.

The more fields that are indexed, the faster the performance will be.

Another thing you could do is run the process in batches, using an indexed field or a primary key. For example, you could first compare the records from the year 2024, then 2023, and so on, using SQL Script.

Regards,

entry.title: Change logs in IS-U
entry.content:
Experts,

I would like to have an option to see the changes done in EA40 Tcode. Currently I can see created by, created on, changed by and changed on details in EA40. If we take Purchase orders (ME23N), we have an option to see detailed log - When was the PO changed, who changed it, which fields were changed, old value before change and value after change. Do we have a similar feature for ISU transactions? If not, how do you usually generate change logs in ISU. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Relationship between Sales Office and Sales Group
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

Does it allow now in the public cloud as I'm facing the same issue that I'm unable to create sales group with same ID or values to multiple sales office.

entry.title: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content:
My code are as follow：
  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'S'.  "同步更新
  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK 
CALL TRANSACTION 'VA05' USING bdcdata[] OPTIONS FROM ctu_parameters
     MESSAGES INTO lt_message .

And then i change the code as follow，It still doesn't take effect
 *  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
*  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
*  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'L'.  "后台更新
*  ctu_parameters-defsize = 'X'.  "默认大小
*  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK
*  ctu_parameters-nobinpt = 'X'. "批输入处理活动
*  ctu_parameters-nobiend = 'X'. "批输入处理活动

entry.title: SAP RAP - Create of grandchild is not working/reacting
entry.content:
Hi Community! 🙂

For a longer time we´re facing an issue with our RAP application. We are not able to do a create on a table, which is a grandchild of our root entity

Situation:

  • Root Entity (Location)
  • [0..1] Composition from Location -> Entity Topic (in this case Nature, we have 5 in total)

 

 

composition [0..1] of ZEHS_I_DemoTopic_Nature        as _TopicNatureDemo2

 

 

 

  • [0..*] Composition from Topic -> Entity with table entries

 

 

composition [0..*] of ZEHS_I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE as _InvSpNature

 

 

Location -> [0..1] Location -> [0..*] Table

Behavior Definition:

 

 

// Location
define behavior for I_Location alias Location
lock master
etag master LastChangedDateTime
with unmanaged save
{
  update;

  field ( readonly ) Country, LocationID, CountryText, LocationTypeText, RegionText, Region;

  association _TopicNatureDemo2 { create; }
  }

// Topic
        define behavior for I_DemoTopic_Nature alias DemoTopicNature
        lock dependent by _Location
        with unmanaged save
        {
          update;

          association _InvSpNature { create; }

//          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID;

          association _Location;
        }

// Table inside Topic (_InvSpNature)
        // Invasive Species
        define behavior for I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE alias DemoInvSpNature
        persistent table ...
        lock dependent by _Location
        etag master LastChangeDateTime
        {
          update;
          delete;

          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetInvSpeUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID, LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;

          association _TopicNature;
          association _Location;
        }

 

 

So far we see an ObjectPage with our Section Nature Topic. In this Section, there is also the table with our lineItems.

 

Problem:

We can navigate into the LineItems and delete them, but pressing on the create button is doing nothing. Can someone help us out? We´re struggling with that for a long time now..

Additional Information:
We also developed a Fiori App via BAS and added a custom Navigation to the manifest.json. Navigation and Delete/Update works, create button still doesnt react.

 

 

              "ObjectPage|DemoInvSpNature": {
                "component": {
                  "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage"
                },
                "entitySet": "DemoInvSpNature",
                "navigationProperty": "to_TopicNatureDemo2/to_InvSpNature"
              }

entry.title: Re: How to export and deploy SAP HANA models for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi @kathysuarez, you can download it from the mentioned SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/2008991

Best regards,
Darius

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP on premise system with Google Drive so that we can call API's using ABAP
entry.content: To get the SSL certificate for https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files open it in a browser. Search the web for: download ssl certificate <name of your browser>.

entry.title: Re: ATP check for sto purchase orders
entry.content:
Hello,

to see it in the STO itself is quite simple: You select the item and press the button "Check Availability" below the item list (see screenshot below).

You will see the well-known delivery proposal screen, from where you can navigate to the check details.

Best regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: FBRA Error: 'Document XXXXXXXXX is not purely a clear...
entry.content: i do not understand how you used F-28 without refering to open items .

entry.title: Re: How to check c4c workflow rule activate and deactivat...
entry.content:
Dear Dhaval,

Good day 🙂

Currently there is no way to check for the Workflow Activation date in the frontend. But we have way to check the change log of the WKF in the backend.

If you have any issue with the WKF, please kindly raise a ticket to us, and we will check further.

Thanks and Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: Reuse of sap:label in sap cap application with extern...
entry.content:
The following influence request has been raised : https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/330319

 

Thanks,

Florian

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Updating Target API Level to 34 for Google Play Compliance
entry.content: Had the same issue - what I did is applied an extension from Google Play store so that my current builds won't be affected and will have more time to wait for SAP team to fix and apply new sdk.

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
Thank you @XaviPolo for the inputs.

I will explore on this function HASH_MD5() which I have not used before & apply.

Currently I have tried the below approach via Storedproc that seems to be working much faster than MINUS, JOIN operations.

Select D1,D2,D3,.....D50 , Sum(Amount_new) , Sum(Amount_OLD)

From 

(

Select D1,D2,D3,.....D50, Amount as Amount_new , 0 as Amount_Old from Table_New

Union All

Select D1,D2,D3,.....D50, 0 as Amount_New , Amount as  Amount_Old  as from Table_old

)

Group by D1,D2,D3,.....D50

Having  Sum(Amount_new) <>  Sum(Amount_old)

 

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: ATP check for sto purchase orders
entry.content: Hello Martin, Thankyou for the reply .i would like to see configuration or atp checks what are maintained in system  for sto purchase orders as i have working in cloud version is there a path for it to see same like sd atp checks

entry.title: Re: How can I import my SAP GUI Migration file onto the n...

entry.title: Re: Configuring the Internal Hiring/Crossboarding Process in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
With Future Manager setup, Onboarding Tasks are assigned to Future Manager to complete the tasks however the current hiring manager also could able to see these onboarding tasks on their dashboard however the current hiring managers will not able complete the tasks since those are not assigned to them. Is this expected behavior? Do we have any specific reference document for this? Please confirm.

 

Appreciate your support

entry.title: Re: Attachment in Purchase Order API
entry.content:
Hello Deepthi,

the question is not so easy to answer.

The question is, from where do you want to create the purchase order, i.e. do you send the purchase order to the SAP system from outside?

If this is the case, you must first authorise a connection from the SAP S/4HANA system to the outside, which in turn is security-critical. You also need to look at the best way to set this up and discuss it with the network team.

If you don't have this problem, you can set it up according to this blog:
Purchase Order via API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV - Example API-call

Regards
Jim

entry.title: Re: GR based invoice verification and Good receipt flag n...
entry.content: As you are creating the PO through automatic PO creation ME59N, check if the purchase info record is determined in the PR you have created and also confirm if both the fields are checked for that PIR in the concerned purchase org

entry.title: Re: Validating Mandatory fields in FPM Applications when clicking on SAVE button in toolbar
entry.content: This method Adds a * sign in front of the filed but does not raise error message when click save.. any further implementation has to done to raising error message

entry.title: Re: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content:
Dear @Wenny,

for reading stock information you can use Material Stock - Read | SAP Help Portal.

Communication Scenario is: Material Stock Integration (SAP_COM_0164).

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content: I got an idea through your answer. First, we will try to change the Static Buildpack to NGINX Buildpack, and in terms of setting up NGINX, we will try to restrict access. If this is not possible, I will try to upload a static file to the local directory of the approver. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to find the Transport request for table entry
entry.content: SCU3 in the target system worked beautifully for me, thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Why & When amend Roles with Obsolete or Depreca
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

Just some real world feedback for you - I think it's important for people to know what SU25 will do and not just do it as, for example - SAP will happily remove an authorisation from SU24 for a transaction that you will need to manually add back (S_DATASET as an example breaking anyone doing things with server files), plus if you have a support role like I do (which has all catalogues in it, but not the underlying access so support can see everything without needing to assign all roles to themselves) - this would plain break the SoD in place by giving them all the required access (and potentially open authorisations that could be incorrectly filled.

Also, I've had a place where they separated authorisation into a different role from the underlying menus (pre-FLP days) - So this could break the authorisation model if run (albeit this should be considered legacy).

Do not underestimate the impact of running SU25 blindly - e.g. If I update a role in PFCG using the comparison functionality, I also check what will be added or removed as it may not be suitable.

Cheers,
Matt

entry.title: Re: Verify General Journal Entries - Configuration Steps in S/4HANA 1909
entry.content: Thank you very much for the step by step process

entry.title: ALV Cursor position
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement about alv cursor position but I faced a problem. I was able to Highlighted to cell using this code:

    DATA: ls_row    TYPE i,
          ls_value  TYPE c,
          ls_col    TYPE i,
          ls_row_id TYPE lvc_s_row,
          ls_col_id TYPE  lvc_s_col,
          es_row_no TYPE lvc_s_roid.

    CALL METHOD lo_alv->get_current_cell
      IMPORTING
        e_row     = ls_row
        e_value   = ls_value
        e_col     = ls_col
        es_row_id = ls_row_id
        es_col_id = ls_col_id
        es_row_no = es_row_no.
    IF ls_col = 1."next line
      ls_col_id = 'LGORT'.  "cursor will go this field.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->set_current_cell_via_id
        EXPORTING
          is_column_id = ls_col_id
          is_row_no    = es_row_no.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display
        EXPORTING
*          is_stable      =
          i_soft_refresh = abap_true
*        EXCEPTIONS
*          finished       = 1
*          others         = 2
        .
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
*       MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
*                  WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
      ENDIF.
    ELSE.
      ls_col_id = 'WERKS'.  "cursor will go this field.
      es_row_no-row_id = conv i( es_row_no-row_id ) + 1 .
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->set_current_cell_via_id
        EXPORTING
          is_column_id = ls_col_id
          is_row_no    = es_row_no.
    ENDIF.

but cursor itself located top of screen where we enter tcode here is cursor position where its located:

How can I solve this problem.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

I’m Deepa Baskaran from India. As a returning mother, I have previous experience working on SAP Business Intelligence development projects, but I took a considerable break from the IT sector. During this time, I transitioned to teaching roles at higher academic institutions and also consistently upskilled myself with the latest tools and technologies, with a recent focus on cloud computing.

I’m truly inspired by this Digital Skills initiative, as it presents the perfect opportunity to upskill on the latest SAP technologies, get certified, and re-enter the SAP working community with confidence and a refreshed skill set. I look forward to leveraging this platform to support my career restart.
Thanks

entry.title: Re: how i can check price change history
entry.content:
Execute CKMPCSEARCH to get the price change document number for the material. Then execute CKMPCD to get the details.

You can also refer to:

Solved: MM Price Change history - SAP Community

How to check material price history of particular ... - SAP Community

entry.title: How can I check whether the token is expired?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using sap bo rest services. Before calling the services I must get the logon token. So I am using /logon/long endpoint to get token but I am getting new token in every request so this is a problem. 

I want to get one token and use that token until it expires. So How can I learn how long the token expires? 

If I can learn how many minutes a token is valid for, I can record it in a table and check it. Or does anyone have a different suggestion?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am Tu Nguyen from Vietnam

I want to improve myself in SAP and I am in "want to change mid-life career" category,

Thanks so much,

Tu

entry.title: Re: Error Creating Execution in AI Launchpad Using Docker Registry Secret
entry.content: Hello! assuming you have verified the namespace and the secret names are correct, I would ask you to provide the Argo Workflows RBAC configuration. Argos role are key, and you will find it here https://argo-workflows.readthedocs.io/en/latest/security/, make sure you have the apiGroups, resources and verbs correctly setup, then restart the argo workflows. Also, inspect the kubernetes events with "kubectl describe workflow <workflow-name> -n <namespace>" and paste results here

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Dortmund 05.09.2024

Hallo zusammen,

bin seit dem 02.09. ein Adessi und der GS Düsseldorf zugeordnet. Falls es passt komme ich gerne mal zum Stammtisch, aber für diese Woche muss ich leider absagen. War Mo./Di. in Dortmund und gestern in München bei den Welcome-Days. Den Rest der Woche ist Home-Office angesagt.

LG Berndt

entry.title: Re: DISPATCHER GRAY
entry.content:
Hello, 

in the dev_w* log there is the error:

Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=2

Check the configuration as described in KBA:

2961140 - SQLERRTEXT : general error: database 'SID' not connected

Regards, Alwina

However, after archiving the data, the data cannot be displayed anymore. I have been looking for the alternative ways such as different transaction code, report program or table which stores the archived data. Thanks.

Dear Colleagues,

we're using, as many others from you, the ZSOLMANPRO role config in SolMan.

regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: Custom checks to Business Partner external number
entry.content: Please let me know the approach you have followed for BP Number validation

entry.title: Tricentis Test Automation for SAP integrated with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced digital landscape, optimizing cloud-based workflows is essential for maintaining efficiency and productivity. Since it's been a while since my last post, I wanted to share some new tips I've recently discovered with you.This blog is going again into key tips for using TTA Cloud, focusing on its connection to SAP Cloud ALM, the reuse of modules, and the effective use of the output function. By understanding how to use these options, you can ease your way into the tool, and make the most out of TTA Cloud's capabilities. Let's explore how these tips can enhance your cloud experience.

The topic that will be discussed in the Blog:

  • How is TTA Connected to SAP Cloud ALM?
  • How to reuse modules
  • How to use the output function ?

 

 

How is TTA Cloud Connected to CALM?

When discussing the connection between the Agent and SAP Cloud ALM, it’s important to highlight that this integration uses advanced technologies like SignalR (WebSocket) and HTTPS to ensure real-time and secure communication. SignalR is particularly beneficial for creating applications that require frequent updates from the server without constantly polling, which is crucial for maintaining efficient and secure connections between TTA Cloud and SAP Cloud ALM.

SignalR simplifies adding real-time web functionality by allowing bidirectional communication between client and server. In this setup, when installing the team agent via the command line, sensitive keys are needed to establish a secure connection. These keys must be handled with care, ensuring they are kept secure on the client side. Once the agent is successfully connected to SAP Cloud ALM, TTA employs encryption methods to maintain the security of the connection. This means that customers do not need to store these sensitive keys after the connection is established, reducing the risk of potential security breaches.

This setup not only ensures the integrity of data being transmitted but also simplifies the user experience by automating the security processes involved in maintaining a secure connection. The use of SignalR allows for a smooth and continuous data flow, which is essential in environments where real-time updates are critical.

In summary, the combination of SignalR and HTTPS ensures a secure, reliable, and efficient connection between the Agent and SAP Cloud ALM, handling sensitive information with the highest security standards. This allows businesses to focus on their core operations without worrying about the complexities of maintaining a secure communication channel.

 

A tip for reusing modules effectively

Reusing modules can ease your workflow, especially when dealing with similar Apps. In SAP Cloud ALM for example, for me a similar page that comes to mind is the similarity of the tabs between creatinging a Task, a User Story, a Requirement or a Feature. All  start with a Title, Text format and Additional information is pretty similar. In this case obviously you don’t want to rescan over an over same tabs.

Example:

Suppose you have scanned a User Story creation and want to use this module for Tasks, Requirements, and other pages. Follow these steps:

  1. Open the already scanned module enter the edit mode.
  2. Delete the current Tab Title from the the “Indentification value” box and add below command: {REGEX[Tasks|Requirements|3rdtab|…etc]}. Add all the tab Titles you need this module for.

3. Save the module and re-use now the module.

Tip: To get the correct tab name, hover over the browser icon, and use the name displayed in full or just the first word followed by the star symbol.

 

 

How to Buffer (Copy and Paste) Values with TTA Cloud

When handling different processes, you might need to save the Document Number to use it later on for the creation of other Documents  (Example: the Purchase Requisition number for the creation of a Purchase Order). This can be achieved through buffering.

There are two ways to do this:

  • Using Action mode Output
  • Using Tosca Command

 

Action Mode Output

Using Output is simpler as it avoids the need to remember specific Tosca commands.

To Copy use the Output function and assign a name to the variable. For example, to copy the title of a Task in the example below I named my variable: e.g., "123".

To Paste use the Keyboard Standard command and refer to the variable name within curly brackets.

Using commands from Tosca:

Alternatively, you can use Tosca commands:

  • To buffer the value, use the command {XB[VariableName]} with the action mode set to verify

 

Conclusion

In conclusion, effectively leveraging the capabilities of Tricentis Test Automation (TTA) for SAP Cloud ALM can help your testing processes. By understanding how to establish secure, real-time connections using technologies like SignalR and HTTPS, reusing modules efficiently, and employing output functions for buffering values, you can enhance productivity and ensure robust testing outcomes. Feel free to reach out with any additional topics you'd like to explore.

entry.title: Ship-to address changes in deliveries and shipments already completed.
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope someone can help me with the following issue.

Our standard practice is to manually enter ship-to addresses for sales orders. This process triggers the creation of a new ADRNR, which is then propagated when creating subsequent documents.

Sometimes, after the completion of some deliveries, it may become necessary to modify the ship-to address specified on the order. This adjustment should apply only to outstanding deliveries, still, it's also affecting deliveries that have already been completed, which means we're losing the information about where those shipments actually went.

We're aware of a user exit that allows us to create a new ADRNR for the modification instead of changing the address for the current one. By creating a new ADRNR, we avoid affecting completed deliveries, but it doesn't change pending deliveries, which is a requirement.

Does anyone have experience with a similar issue or know how we can prevent this from happening?

Thanks in advance for your cooperation.

Ginno Giuffra

entry.title: Re: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content: Maybe it's normal, if there was no message at all. You must test SY-SUBRC too. See ABAP documentation of CALL TRANSACTION USING.

entry.title: Re: Custom checks to Business Partner external number
entry.content: Hi, we have the same requirement, how did you achieve this validation

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.1”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.1 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

In this release, we will continue piloting the new Commenting Feature for What's New documentation. See this blog for more information.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Sales Order text line interface back to Deli...
entry.content:
@ANKIT_CHAUHANplease refer to the updated attachment above.

 

1. there is a SO created in SAP B1 with the list of content of item codes and text (Type = T)

2. Via SAP B1 API, interface  the list of Item to my inventory system on to process.

3. Interface back to SAP B1 to created a Delivery Note that referring back the SO.

4. But issue is the Text line all missing.

 

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: ALV Cursor position
entry.content: The focus was lost. Did you try cl_gui_control=>set_focus( lo_alv ). (+ handle classic exceptions)

entry.title: Re: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO...
entry.content: Besides, I have another question. If the batch update is executed, only the first one is successful, and the others are not updated successfully

entry.title: Re: ABAP Enterprise Service - RFC Consumer - Where maintain RFC Destination / Logical Port
entry.content: LP_CONFIG has been replaced by SOAMANAGER (although some clients still use LP_CONFIG instead of migrating to SOAMANAGER, sometimes data exist in both!) Where did you look in SOAMANAGER?

entry.title: Re: ALV Cursor position
entry.content:
https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/set-focus-on-alv-oo/td-p/5166329
in the link above I saw that the set_focus solution should be used in pbo. Now the problem solved thank you  for your reply.

entry.title: A new data center is now available in Canada for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
I am pleased to announce that we have just opened a new data center in Canada for SAP Cloud ALM extending our overall coverage.

It can be found in the SAP Trust Center:

List of available data centers for SAP Cloud ALM

When provisioning SAP Cloud ALM from SAP for Me, the new data center will be available for selection:

If your customer number is mapped to Canada, then the data center should be selected by default otherwise you can select if from the drop-down.

Enjoy!

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
Yes, anything columnar (like union) is faster.

Here you are not really comparing all fields, just the dimensions and a single measure (the aggregate).
If that's OK in your scenario, it's better than comparing all fields like MINUS does.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content: @Zerosnow glad i could help 🙂

entry.content: Sorry I am not able to search for Application on S/4HANA Cloud : 'Custom CDS Views for variant configuration'

i look in SOAMANAGER and in the Webservice Management and in the Design Time Cache I dont find my RFC Consumer.

entry.content: Hi, i look in SOAMANAGER and in the Webservice Management and in the Design Time Cache I dont find my RFC Consumer. In SPROXY it is available

entry.title: Re: How to Implement Joule with SAC
entry.content:
Hi @LeonardoGarcia2 

i believe that SAP product management have plans to natively integrate a generative assistant into SAP Analytics Cloud's software service. 

You can see that marked as 'future product vision' on the roadmap here: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67838200100800006884&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=F1057575CA871EEE93AF5EE1D28134D1

Regards, H

entry.title: Details required on intelligent services
entry.content: Is it possible to configure in LMS through Intelligent services that system will identify employee "is first manager" in LMS so local admin team use that information and assign training to specific first time manager

entry.title: Cancel Delivery Request - Stuck Queue on EWM side, delivery not created and no longer needed
entry.content:
ERP delivery is distributed to EWM, but getting stuck in queue due to missing customizing. Related errors:

  • Could not create header data delivery &1, system &2 (/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION012)
  • No document type found for delivery type &1 from system &2 (/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION002) 

The delivery is no longer needed, need to be cancelled / rejected.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cancel Delivery Request - Stuck Queue on EWM side, de...
entry.content:
Error "Could not create header data delivery &1, system &2" (/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION012) is always added to the log, when the EWM delivery can't be created. This is a general error message. The other message is more specific, like in above question (of course there are other messages to reflect specific scenarios).

Check the context of the delivery. If the delivery was created by accident and not need to be processed in EWM, it can be rejected via Warehouse Monitor.

If the delivery is still required, check if the missing customizing can be created, or if the delivery needs to be created with different parameters. In this case, you may also need to reject the stuck delivery to create a new one from scratch.

Rejection from SMQ2 (on EWM side) is documented in SAP Knowledge Base Article 3384239 - Delivery document cannot be created in EWM, stuck in SMQ2 queue.

KBA 3384239.

entry.title: Re: Let's get to know each other!
entry.content:
Hi @JD_WongLoera,

Indeed! 'Transformation Manager' does have a good ring to it. 😄

Thank you for sharing your insights and experiences! We're thrilled to have someone with your extensive background and passion for process transformation join our group. Your recent blog posts on SAP Signavio topics have been truly inspiring. Looking forward to learning and growing together!

Cheers!

entry.title: Re: How to change the destination stock type of a HU - Usage of BAdI /SCWM/EX_CORE_GM_CAT
entry.content:
Hi Shailesh,

I found your blog on “How to change the destination stock type of a HU” incredibly interesting and useful. Your detailed explanation and practical insights are invaluable for anyone working with SAP EWM. Thank you for sharing your knowledge and contributing to the SAP community. Your efforts are truly commendable and make a significant difference for all of us.

Keep up the noble work!

Best regards,
Abhishek

entry.title: Re: Exception handling of decision is working unexpectedly.
entry.content: Thank you for your advice. I updated my question.

entry.title: Tracking transformations by leveraging Architecture Decisions
entry.content:
In Enterprise Architecture, managing an Architecture Decision Catalog is best practice and in the SAP Enterprise Architecture Methodology this catalog is listed as part of the Requirements and Governance Domain. When setting up an Enterprise Architecture Practice, we recommend specifying for which granularity of decisions such entries should be created. It is also crucial to define the decision process itself, which might include an Enterprise Architecture Board approval.

This article will first discuss the benefits of Architecture decisions. The second paragraph will describe the explicit use of decisions before we refer to our architecture decision support knowledge papers in the final section.

What are Architecture Decisions and why do we need them ?

Architecture decisions are strategic choices that address significant aspects within a system's design and architecture. For Enterprise Architects, they involve crucial choices  regarding  architecture principles,  technologies, models and paradigms which should be incorporated or followed within a company's entire system landscape. Such decisions have long-term impacts and therefore create significant influence on the company's agility, efficiency, cost and risk.

Explicit and well-grounded Architecture decisions can benefit Enterprise Architects in several ways.

  • Optimization of Resources: Making informed and well-considered decisions allows for the best distribution of resources, both in terms of personnel and infrastructure. Organizations can steer clear from investing in technologies or methodologies that may not align with their long-term goals or may result in technical debt.
  • Risk Management: Through careful decision-making, possible risks can be significantly mitigated. For instance, the use of a proprietary technology could lead to vendor lock-in, which can be a serious concern for some organizations. By considering this potential risk in the decision-making process, alternative solutions can be identified.
  • Strategic Alignment: Architectural decisions ensure that all technological initiatives are aligned with the organization's business  and IT goals and strategies. This guarantees that all technological investments and efforts contribute towards a common vision, rather than following disconnected objectives.
  • Conflict Resolution: During the system and landscape design and development process, various stakeholders (like developers, product management, operations) often have differing opinions on components to use and how to compose them to an overall architecture. Architecture decision-making provides a transparent way to evaluate alternatives and assessing multiple criteria.
  • Regulatory Compliance: In many industries, compliance with certain standards or regulations is obligatory. In such cases, architecture decisions become critical to ensure that the organization's IT landscape remains compliant while still delivering its intended business value.
  • Innovation and Transformation: As businesses evolve and transform, making the right architecture decisions can pave the way for innovation, allowing businesses to seamlessly adopt newer technologies like AI, cloud computing etc. to stay ahead in the market.

In conclusion, Architecture decisions are fundamental components of the work enterprise architects do. They form the building blocks that define how an organization’s IT landscape supports its business capabilities and goals.

 

How to use Architecture Decisions

Architecture decisions are the backbone of  architecture, shaping its structure and guiding its evolution.  Here's our suggested approach to using them

You can gain the following benefits by following the above approach

  • Consistency - Ensures design choices are consistent across the project.
  • Improved Communication - Promotes clear understanding among stakeholders.
  • Reduced Technical Debt -Prevents ad-hoc decisions that lead to future problems.
  • Increased Agility - Allows for more efficient adaptation to changing requirements.
  • Better Decision Making -Supports informed choices based on documented rationale.

It is important to keep in mind that decisions are not set in stone: Architecture needs to be dynamic, responsive and open to change. Also, the collaboration among all involved stakeholders is key to come to aligned decisions.

How SAP Transformation Hub supports you

We have been working on a plethora of Architecture decisions which have already been published on our Enterprise Architecture Knowledge Base (login required). 

Below is an excerpt of a decision accelerator related to EWM deployment options which can be found in our database.

Although your organization's decision options and criteria may vary, you are encouraged to leverage the structured approach and tailor those examples to your program's needs.

We have also created an Enterprise Architecture Decisions register template which can be used as a starting point for your own Enterprise Architecture practice. It gives you an initial starting point and contains, among other information, the links to the respective decision articles mentioned above. The number of Architecture Decision articles keeps growing, and we are constantly publishing new content.

We maintain a pipeline of decisions to be evaluated and look forward to interactions with you in case of questions, suggestions for future topics or if you want to contribute your own Enterprise Architecture related knowledge article.

Feel free to contact us via email

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Linkage Between "Activate Advanced Valuati...
entry.content:
Dear CA Amar Modanwal, 

first of all thanks a lot for asking this question. The configuration activities you are mentioning are independent from each other. The Advanced Valuation Runs rely on it's own account determination with all source accounts tagged with the semantic tag (for Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation, Discounting of Long-Term Assets and Liabilities, Credit-Risk-Based Impairment) or maintained in the configuration activity directly (B/S Reclassification). 

Best regards,

Kevin Sigl

entry.title: Re: how to change currency type in AR report S_ALR_87012176？
entry.content:
The report run by the transaction (RFDOPR00) uses tables KNC1 and KNC3, which only contain cumulative amounts in company currency, so basically: you can't use this report in document currency.

Develop your own report, based on detail items (or a BI/BW solution)

entry.title: Re: name1 is not showing in BUT00O NAME1_ORG field
entry.content: I am facing another issue while creating purchasing documents in Fiori when I give the name1 in search for BP with category(3) are not appearing

entry.title: Set up dep key -Percentage based 1st 2 years and then rem. useful life based considering scrap value
entry.content:
Hi All,

How can we set up the below depreciation key in SAP ?

Acq Value - 20,000 , Scrap (Residual) Value = 5,000 , Useful life = 5 years

First 2 years , the depreciation is based on percentage i.e. 17.5%

1st year dep = 20,000*17.5% = 3500

2nd year dep = 20,000*17.5% = 3500 

from 3rd year onwards - it becomes based on remaining useful life

Net book value of asset after 2nd year = 20,000-7,000 (1st 2 years dep - 3500+3500) = 13,000 

Scrap Value = 5,000

Depreciation for remaining 3 years = 13000-5000/3 = 2,666.67

How can we achieve it in a standard way ? I believe we need to use changeover method but not sure which option to use. The screenshot of depreciation calculation is attached.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Prioritize open inspection lots-

Hello,

I also have the same question since I found myself with the same request.

Thank you,

Any ideas ?

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve daily work calendar from EC Timesheet...

entry.title: Essential SAP Security Principles Every Administrator Should Know
entry.content:
As SAP systems continue to be critical for business operations, securing them properly is more important than ever. This post will cover some key SAP security principles that every administrator should be familiar with.

Authentication and authorization form the foundation of SAP security. Implementing strong password policies, using multi-factor authentication where possible, and following the principle of least privilege when assigning roles are crucial steps. Regular audits of user access help ensure unnecessary privileges are removed promptly.
Protecting network traffic is equally important. SAP's Secure Network Communications (SNC) should be used to encrypt traffic, along with proper network segmentation and firewalls. All external connections should use SSL/TLS, and network traffic should be monitored for any anomalies.

Keeping systems updated through effective patch management is vital for maintaining security. Staying current on SAP Security Notes and patches, thoroughly testing before applying to production, and having a defined patch management process are essential practices.

Ongoing monitoring and auditing help detect issues before they become major problems. Enabling and monitoring security audit logs, using tools like SAP Solution Manager for centralized monitoring, and regularly reviewing logs for suspicious activity are key. Periodic security assessments and penetration tests provide additional assurance.

These principles are just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to SAP security. It's a complex field that requires ongoing vigilance and education. To help administrators deepen their knowledge, we're excited to announce that our comprehensive SAP Security course is now available for free to the first 100 students who enroll. This course covers these principles in depth, along with many other crucial aspects of SAP security. Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your skills and better protect your organization's critical systems.

https://www.udemy.com/course/sap-security-core-concepts-and-security-administration/?couponCode=SAP_SECURITY_FREE

What other SAP security principles do you think are essential? Share your thoughts in the comments, and don't forget to sign up for the free course while spots are still available!

entry.title: Re: Purchase order date
entry.content:
Hello @Alejandra_BG 

Mentioned solution doesn't apply to you as you are having SAP Public cloud with no access to tables.

For your query yes PO output is sent to the supplier and marked as Completed when a PO is approved in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. However, if the PO workflow is not configured, the output will be sent when the PO is saved.

Another thing you want is the PO approval date on output not creation date. I will request you to check once the existing data source if it contains that field in the email template., otherwise look for CDS which can fulfill your requirement via View Browser app.

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: How do you add header text to RFQ Form
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS BP
entry.content:
IAM landscape planning is often a question of preference:-) 
As a first step I'd recommend to have a look at the BTP Best Practices guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/best-practices/best-practices-for-sap-btp providing a specific chapter for recommended integration with https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/best-practices/onboard-to-sap-cloud-identity-services 
In the SAP Discovery Center there are (high-level) recommendations how a landscape could be structured:
https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/refArchCatalog/?category=security 
But at the end of the day one has to decide based on the already existing IAM landscape and should try to connect applications in a consistent way to the identity providers (e.g. prod idp for all applications or prod idp for productive applications only and all test/QA landscapes utilize test idp)

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
Hi Andre, 

 

thanks a lot for this great Blog. I generated a Proxy in our DEV System which worked great, however now I am wondering how I can transport it to QA. By default the proxy seems to be in service group /IWBEP/ALL however this is only for DEV and QA as per documentation: Service Registration (sap.com). Do i need to create a new service group for the service and if so how do I register the proxy as a service in that group? Or is there another way to go about this?

 

Best Regards,

Niklas

entry.title: S&OP - creation of product groups.
entry.content:
Hi,

S&OP - creation of product groups. 

All the materials are created with one material type Zxxx => no products with mat type PROD exist.

In MMNR via F5 I see no interval assigned to PROD.

Does it mean that I cannot use/create product groups in MC84 / at all if the materials are not of the mat type PROD? 

I cannot create a material via mm01 with the the type PROD.

Is there any possibility to create products groups for customized material types Zxxx?

best regards,

Walter

entry.title: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
I want to transfer Unrestricted-Use Stock from GS01 to Blocked Stock at GS02. When using the following field values, I received the error message:"Deficit of SL Stck.in qual.insp 1 PC : MPD241204BK24 GS00 GS01"
Here is my post body

{
    "PostingDate": "2024-09-05T00:00:00",
    "GoodsMovementCode": "04",  // Transfer Posting
    "to_MaterialDocumentItem": [
        {
            "Plant": "GS00",
            "StorageLocation": "GS01",
            "InventoryStockType": "01",
            "Material": "MPD241204BK24",
            "GoodsMovementType": "321",
            "QuantityInEntryUnit": "1",
            "IssuingOrReceivingPlant": "GS00",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStorageLoc": "GS02",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStockType": "03"
        }
    ]
}
How should I adjust the field values?

entry.title: Re: How to include a URL to access the SAP WF approval sc...
entry.content: No, I mean you should open a support ticket -> https://launchpad.support.sap.com/ component is BC-BMT-WFM We have colleagues working in support. But they need a ticket.

entry.title: Approval of documents Based on Sales Employee
entry.content:
Dear Team

We are using SAP B1 Version 10 Hana.

We have 7 buyers in company, our Data entry clerks are entering data in SAP.

So we require approval template in a way, that approval will be like below.

Originator >> Buyer >> CEO

Where:

Buyers are multiple

CEO is only one.

Please support to fix approval template as per our requirements.

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Enterprise Organizational Management in S/4HANA Service
entry.content:
Hi Andres,
I am sorry to say but there is no tool nor simple instruction note to migrate from CS to S/4HANA Service. This is really a project of its own.
There are some features in S/4HANA Service that make the migration from CS to S/4HANA Service easier. Most notably the feature "Service with Advanced Execution" (see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c9b5e9de6e674fb99fff88d72c352291/51cfa721e37542a5b082cdb86ce5556f.html?locale=en-US) that allows to re-use many of the CS concepts in S/4HANA Service as well, including e.g. Task Lists, procurement integration, resource related billing, ...
There is also an older blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/new-maintenance-service-process-in-sap-s-4hana-2022/ba-p/13557797 that introduces the topic based on the S/4HANA 2022 release. There were many additional capabilities shipped with release S/4HANA 2023, see e.g. https://me.sap.com/notes/3330419 

Kind regards, Oliver

entry.title: Re: Error During ChangeSet Offline Call
entry.content:
@bill_froelich 

Item actually do not have any link to Head.

 

<EntityType Name="Item" m:HasStream="true" sap:content-version="1">
 <Key>
  <PropertyRef Name="OrderS"/>
  <PropertyRef Name="Posnr"/>
 </Key>
 <Property Name="Discount" Type="Edm.Decimal" Nullable="false" Precision="3" Scale="1" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cliente" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="OrderS" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Doc. commerc." sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Posnr" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="6" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Posizione" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Matnr" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="40" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Materiale" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="EAN" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="18" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cd. EAN/UPC" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="CustMaterial" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="35" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Mat. cliente" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="ShipTo" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cliente" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Qty" Type="Edm.Decimal" Nullable="false" Precision="13" Scale="13" sap:unicode="false" sap:unit="UM" sap:label="Qtà prevista" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="UM" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="3" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Unità mis. base" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false" sap:semantics="unit-of-measure"/>
 <Property Name="DataCons" Type="Edm.DateTime" Precision="0" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Data" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Tester" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="1" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Casella di spunta" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Value" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="500" sap:unicode="false" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Url" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="500" sap:unicode="false" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Storage" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Magazzino" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="TypePos" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cat. pos." sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Plant" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Divisione" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="DescriptionMat" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="40" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Descrizione" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
</EntityType>

<EntitySet Name="ItemSet" EntityType="ZXXXXXSRV.Item" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:deletable="false" sap:pageable="false" sap:addressable="false" sap:content-version="1"/>

entry.title: Re: How to include a URL to access the SAP WF approval sc...
entry.content: you did the customizing in maintenance view SWP_URL_CONFIG_V? There you can also check your settings with a workitem ID.

entry.title: Re: Custom code analysis for SAP S/4HANA with SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migration
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja,

Thank you very much for the helpful information.
I hope to get some support from you as I have a specific problem with the “Scope status”.
The Custom Code Migration App is installed on premise on a S/4HANA 2023 SP01 FP 02/2024 system.

I have loaded SUSG data from an ERP EHP8 production system into the development system.
Now I would like to check “FUNCTIONAL_DB” via ATC due to the upcoming “Suite on HANA” migration. So far so good.

A “Custom Code Analysis” project has been created.
Usage data from the development system has been added.
Results are available after the check.

But I do not receive any “Scoped Objects”. I started the analysis again, but that didn't produce any results yesterday either.
Any idea what the problem could be?

entry.title: Re: Questions about the Payment Advice
entry.content:
Hello GordonH
We can download the payment notice only in PDF format.
I want to download it in another format such as CSV.
Thank you.

entry.title: read field with namespace segment xpath cloud integration
entry.content:
hi,

I need to read the value of the field "message2" from a segment, with Cloud Integration.

this is the body:

<message1 xmlns="test_message1">

<message2>test_odv<message2>

</message1>

I tried //message2 but not working probably for the xmlns.

Does anyone know what the formula is to read the "message2" field?

entry.title: Re: Overall status of sales order (IC -CTAD) showing irre...
entry.content: Check whether you have assigned x to that Reason for Rejection in ovag
